Name: Snickers:
Text: Oh, another one stumbles into my territory...

Name: Snickers:
Text: You walk around so upright. Don't you know how to move low?

Name: Snickers:
Text: We cats know the secret... hold [wave]DOWN[/wave] to crouch and crawl through tight spaces.

Name: Snickers:
Text: Low ceilings, narrow gaps... they're no problem when you stay small.

Name: Snickers:
Text: It's also great for sneaking past things. Not that I'd expect you to pull it off.

Name: Snickers:
Text: ...Then again, maybe you'll surprise me. Try it if you dare.
